mapper.sql: (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM stocks s WHERE s.item_id = i.id AND s.status = 'IN_STOCK') AS stock_count, (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT s.space_id) FROM stocks s WHERE s.item_id = i.id AND s.status = 'IN_STOCK') AS space_count, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM stock_transactions st JOIN stocks s ON st.stock_id = s.id WHERE s.item_id = i.id) AS history_count
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO items ( user_id, name, description, price, serial_mode, serial_prefix, serial_padding_length, serial_increment_unit, serial_next_sequence, lot_mode, lot_vendor_code, lot_date_format, lot_include_sequence, lot_sequence_key, lot_next_sequence, expiration_period_days ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{name}, #{description}, #{price}, #{serialMode}, #{serialPrefix}, #{serialPaddingLength}, #{serialIncrementUnit}, #{serialNextSequence}, #{lotMode}, #{lotVendorCode}, #{lotDateFormat}, #{lotIncludeSequence}, #{lotSequenceKey}, #{lotNextSequence}, #{expirationPeriodDays} )
mapper.select:
SELECT i.id, i.external_id, i.user_id, i.name, i.description, i.price, i.serial_mode, i.serial_prefix, i.serial_padding_length, i.serial_increment_unit, i.serial_next_sequence, i.lot_mode, i.lot_vendor_code, i.lot_date_format, i.lot_include_sequence, i.lot_sequence_key, i.lot_next_sequence, i.expiration_period_days, i.active, i.created_at, ( SELECT img.external_id FROM item_images ii JOIN images img ON img.id = ii.image_id WHERE ii.item_id = i.id ORDER BY ii.is_primary DESC, ii.display_order, ii.created_at LIMIT 1 ) AS primary_image_external_id,
FROM items i WHERE i.id = #{id}

SELECT i.id, i.external_id, i.user_id, i.name, i.description, i.price, i.serial_mode, i.serial_prefix, i.serial_padding_length, i.serial_increment_unit, i.serial_next_sequence, i.lot_mode, i.lot_vendor_code, i.lot_date_format, i.lot_include_sequence, i.lot_sequence_key, i.lot_next_sequence, i.expiration_period_days, i.active, i.created_at, ( SELECT img.external_id FROM item_images ii JOIN images img ON img.id = ii.image_id WHERE ii.item_id = i.id ORDER BY ii.is_primary DESC, ii.display_order, ii.created_at LIMIT 1 ) AS primary_image_external_id,
FROM items i WHERE i.external_id = #{externalId}

SELECT i.id, i.external_id, i.user_id, i.name, i.description, i.price, i.serial_mode, i.serial_prefix, i.serial_padding_length, i.serial_increment_unit, i.serial_next_sequence, i.lot_mode, i.lot_vendor_code, i.lot_date_format, i.lot_include_sequence, i.lot_sequence_key, i.lot_next_sequence, i.expiration_period_days, i.active, i.created_at, ( SELECT img.external_id FROM item_images ii JOIN images img ON img.id = ii.image_id WHERE ii.item_id = i.id ORDER BY ii.is_primary DESC, ii.display_order, ii.created_at LIMIT 1 ) AS primary_image_external_id,
FROM items i WHERE i.user_id = #{userId} AND i.active = TRUE

SELECT i.id, i.external_id, i.user_id, i.name, i.description, i.price, i.serial_mode, i.serial_prefix, i.serial_padding_length, i.serial_increment_unit, i.serial_next_sequence, i.lot_mode, i.lot_vendor_code, i.lot_date_format, i.lot_include_sequence, i.lot_sequence_key, i.lot_next_sequence, i.expiration_period_days, i.active, i.created_at, ( SELECT img.external_id FROM item_images ii JOIN images img ON img.id = ii.image_id WHERE ii.item_id = i.id ORDER BY ii.is_primary DESC, ii.display_order, ii.created_at LIMIT 1 ) AS primary_image_external_id,
FROM items i WHERE i.user_id = #{userId} AND i.active = TRUE
AND i.description LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
AND i.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
ORDER BY
i.created_at ASC, i.id ASC
i.name ASC, i.created_at DESC, i.id DESC
i.created_at DESC, i.id DESC
LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM items i WHERE i.user_id = #{userId} AND i.active = TRUE
AND i.description LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
AND i.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
mapper.update: UPDATE items SET name = #{name}, description = #{description}, price = #{price}, serial_mode = #{serialMode}, serial_prefix = #{serialPrefix}, serial_padding_length = #{serialPaddingLength}, serial_increment_unit = #{serialIncrementUnit}, serial_next_sequence = #{serialNextSequence}, lot_mode = #{lotMode}, lot_vendor_code = #{lotVendorCode}, lot_date_format = #{lotDateFormat}, lot_include_sequence = #{lotIncludeSequence}, lot_sequence_key = #{lotSequenceKey}, lot_next_sequence = #{lotNextSequence}, expiration_period_days = #{expirationPeriodDays} WHERE id = #{id}
